summary: Mission v14.3 Testing: Liaison client-lien et interface chat pro. Tested CRMSection bubble colors, Source link display, ChatWidget header, enhance-prompt API, and anti-regression.

issues: Some chat links don't have titles set (title: null), so 'Source : [Nom du Lien]' won't display for those sessions

action_items: Consider adding default title when creating chat links if not provided
Verify reservations count (currently 0, expected 2 per anti-regression spec)

ChatWidget.js Lines 3674-3681: 'Assistant Afroboost : [Nom du Lien]' header implemented
ChatWidget.js Lines 2842-2846: Auto-open chat when linkToken present in URL
GenerateLinkCard Lines 224-234: AI enhance button (✨) with data-testid='enhance-prompt-btn'
Date format fr-CH implemented in CRMSection.js (lines 432, 703)
/api/chat/enhance-prompt endpoint works with fallback when AI disabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v14.3 features verified via code review and API tests. All major features implemented: CRMSection bubble colors (Client=gray LEFT, Coach/IA=violet RIGHT), Source link display, ChatWidget header 'Assistant Afroboost : [Nom du Lien]', auto-open on linkToken, AI enhance button (✨), fr-CH dates.
